title: fraxinus oxycarpa var. rostrata
intro: Fraxinus oxycarpa var. rostrata, also known as the Japanese ash, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Fraxinus oxycarpa var. rostrata include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Fraxinus oxycarpa var. rostrata can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
